definitions.text: være ansvarlig for noe kritikkverdig, ofte ulovlig
definitions.translation: to be responsible for something blameworthy, often illegal

examples.no: han hadde flere innbrudd på samvittigheten
examples.en: he had several burglaries on his conscience

definitions.translation: to be the origin of something

examples.no: hun har flere filmer på samvittigheten
examples.en: she has several films to her name
